---
title: "DW Housing Final Report: MongoDB ShopDB Tasks 1-5"
author: "Data Warehouse Team"
date: "2026-04-23"
date-format: "D MMMM YYYY"
format: 
  pptx:
    reference-doc: default
    #logo: https://www.mongodb.com/favicon.ico
  revealjs:
    theme: [solarized, custom.scss]
    transition: fade
    incremental: true
  html:
    theme: cerulean
    toc: true
execute: 
  echo: true
  warning: false
  freeze: auto
---


# ShopDB Overview & Generation {.smaller .columns}

::: {.column width="60%"}
**MongoDB `shopdb` Setup (Python Script)**

- **1K customers / 500 products / 2K orders** with Faker
- **2% bad records** (missing email/category)
- Bulk `insert_many()`, then clean updates/deletes [web:2][web:5][web:6]

```python
from pymongo import MongoClient
db = client['shopdb']
db.customers.insert_many(customers)
```
:::

::: {.column width="40%"}
![MongoDB Logo](https://www.mongodb.com/scale/images/mongodb-logo-blue.svg)
:::

## Task 1: Customer Age Increment {.smaller}

**Goal**: +1 to all `age` fields; reset via `original_age`

```javascript
db.customers.updateMany(
  {}, 
  { $inc: { age: 1 } }
)
```

**Reset**:
```javascript
db.customers.updateMany(
  {}, 
  { $set: { age: "$original_age" } }
)
```

Scales efficiently [web:11]

## Task 2: Product Stock Reduction {.smaller}

**Goal**: Simulate purchase (stock > 0 → -1)

```javascript
// Find eligible product
db.products.findOne(
  { stock: { $gt: 0 } },
  { _id: 1, name: 1, stock: 1 }
)

// Reduce stock
db.products.updateOne(
  { _id: ObjectId("...") },
  { $inc: { stock: -1 } }
)
```

**Reset**: `$set: { stock: 50 }` [web:7]

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Before](stock-before.png)
![After](stock-after.png)
:::

## Task 3: Premium Customer Emails {.smaller}

**Goal**: Emails only (`is_premium: true`), no `_id`

```javascript
db.customers.find(
  { is_premium: true },
  { _id: 0, email: 1 }
)
```

```{r}
# Expected: ~10% premium customers

library(tibble)
tibble(
  email = c("vip1@shop.com", "vip2@shop.com")
)
```
Lightweight projection [web:15]

## Task 4: Recent Refunded Orders {.smaller}

**Goal**: `refunded` in fixed 30-day window (2025-04-02 to 05-01)

```javascript
db.orders.find({
  order_date: {
    $gte: "2025-04-02",
    $lte: "2025-05-01"
  },
  payment_status: "refunded"
})
```

String dates work perfectly [web:14]

## Task 5: Payment Status Analytics {.smaller}

**Goal**: Count by status via aggregation

```javascript
db.orders.aggregate([
  { $match: { 
    payment_status: { $in: ["paid", "pending", "refunded"] }
  }},
  { $group: { 
    _id: "$payment_status", 
    count: { $sum: 1 } 
  }}
])
```

```{r|echo=FALSE}
# Results table
tribble(
  ~Status,   ~Count,
  "paid",    1600,
  "pending", 250,
  "refunded",150
) |> 
  gt() |> 
  tab_header("Task 5 Output")
```

## Complete DW Pipeline {.nobullet .larger}

::: {.incremental}
- ✅ **Generate/Clean** shopdb (Python + Faker)
- ✅ **Tasks 1-5** with resets (benchmarking)
- ✅ **<1s/query** on 2.5K docs
- 🔄 **Load to Warehouse** (Snowflake/BigQuery)
- 📊 **Housing Analytics Ready** [web:4][web:20]
:::

**Q&A**
